top_signals.title: Hassett Says Jobs Data Strong, Criticizes Fed's Powell
top_signals.summary: White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett reacts to the June US employment report, saying the US jobs market is on an "upward trajectory." Speaking on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Hassett also criticizes former Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell for staying on at the central bank. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Here we go again? Assessing the inflation risks of the recent energy shock − speech by Megan Greene
top_signals.summary: Given at University of Derby Business School
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Takaichi and Modi Deepen Strategic Ties
top_signals.summary: India and Japan are strengthening ties on defense, technology and energy after Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's first official visit to New Delhi, as both countries look to reduce their dependence on China. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Germany Warship Reversal That Also Sunk a Landmark Tank IPO
top_signals.summary: It’s been a rough few weeks for Europe’s ambitious rearmament efforts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Record-breaking ticket sales for British Museum’s Bayeux Tapestry show
top_signals.summary: More than £2.5mn raised in first allocation of tickets as hundreds of thousands of people queue online for hours
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Central reservations − speech by Alan Taylor
top_signals.summary: Given at the Barclays-CEPR Monetary Policy Forum, London

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley Among Banks Challenging Upbeat Dollar Outlook
top_signals.summary: Currency strategists at Credit Agricole, Morgan Stanley and TD Securities are among those bucking the consensus call for a stronger dollar.

top_signals.title: Traders Go All-In on Nasdaq 100 Bull Case After Recent Rally
top_signals.summary: Normally, a three-month, 30% rally in the Nasdaq 100 Index would tempt investors to take the money and run. But right now, they’re betting the advance is just getting started.
